name: High Roller Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 large Bar of softened cream cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the back of a spatula to spread a thin layer of cream cheese on each tortilla.
2. Sprinkle lightly with garlic powder.
3. Use half of a tortilla to layer roast beef, ham, turkey, Colby Jack cheese, lettuce, and sliced tomatoes.
4. Roll up the tortilla tightly with the cream cheese side sealed last.
5. Cut into 1-inch pieces.
6. Serve 8-10 sandwiches.
